resposta:
solution: 
```
class Solution:
    def gcdOfStrings(self, str1: str, str2: str) -> str:
        if str1 + str2 != str2 + str1:
            return ""
        gcd = self.gcd(len(str1), len(str2))
        return str1[:gcd]
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution first checks if the concatenation of the two strings is equal to the concatenation of the strings in reverse order. If not, it returns an empty string. If they are equal, it calculates the GCD of the lengths of the strings and returns the substring of the first string up to the GCD length.
